name: a8_sandbox_kernel
outcome_goal: Every RuntimeBoundaryError raise is inside runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; execution_backends.py and execution_policy.py only assemble payloads.
verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'raise RuntimeBoundaryError' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/' -k sandbox"

jobs.label: a8_sandbox_kernel
jobs.prompt: On branch praxis/kernel-sandbox, consolidate the sandbox kernel. Touched files: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_policy.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/docker_runner.py. Move RuntimeBoundaryError raising authority into sandbox_runtime.py. execution_backends.py and execution_policy.py should assemble payloads only. File operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.kernel-sandbox-consolidation and open a PR to public referencing it. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'raise RuntimeBoundaryError' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/' -k sandbox"
